tagline.en: The tomatoes and cucumbers move outside!

theme.hero_task: Transplant tomato seedlings into Bed B

tasks.action: Transplant cherry tomato (Sungold) into Bed B

prompt.en: Squeeze the pot gently to pop the plant out -- be careful with the roots!
prompt.da: Klem forsigtigt paa potten for at faa planten ud -- vaer forsigtig med roedderne!

tasks.action: Transplant cucumber seedling onto trellis in Bed B

prompt.en: Plant it right next to the trellis -- it will climb up like the peas!
prompt.da: Plant den lige ved espalieren -- den klatrer op ligesom aerterne!

tasks.action: Transplant sweet pepper into Bed B

prompt.en: This plant will make red peppers you can eat right off the plant!
prompt.da: Den her plante laver roede peberfrugter, du kan spise direkte fra planten!

tasks.action: Plant basil next to tomatoes in Bed B

prompt.en: Basil is the tomato's best friend -- they grow better together! Smell the leaves!
prompt.da: Basilikum er tomatens bedste ven -- de gror bedre sammen! Lugt til bladene!

tasks.action: Transplant Tumbling Tom cherry tomato into Bed B

prompt.en: This tomato will hang over the edge like a waterfall of tomatoes!
prompt.da: Denne tomat haenger ud over kanten som et vandfald af tomater!

tasks.action: Water all beds -- extra water for new transplants

prompt.en: The new plants are nervous in their new home -- give them extra water today!
prompt.da: De nye planter er nervose i deres nye hjem -- giv dem ekstra vand i dag!

growth_events.event: Strawberries beginning to flower -- white petals with yellow centers

prompt.en: Can you count the white flowers? Each one could become a strawberry!
prompt.da: Kan du taelle de hvide blomster? Hver en kan blive til et jordbaer!

growth_events.event: Sunflower seedlings emerging with thick sturdy stems

prompt.en: The sunflower is already pushing up! Measure it with your hand -- how many hands tall?
prompt.da: Solsikken skyder allerede op! Maal den med din haand -- hvor mange haender hoej?
